title: How to Love

writers.lyricist: Ilsey Juber/Jenn Decilveo/Alexander Makhlouf/Jean Paul Makhlouf/Samuel Warren Frisch
writers.composer: Ilsey Juber/Jenn Decilveo/Alexander Makhlouf/Jean Paul Makhlouf/Samuel Warren Frisch

lyrics.translation: 一二三

lyrics.text: I been running from the pain
lyrics.translation: 我已脱离痛境

lyrics.text: Trying not to feel the same
lyrics.translation: 试着不再重蹈覆辙

lyrics.text: But it's a shame that we sinking
lyrics.translation: 但遗憾的是我们都在沉沦
看见我的信心在动摇了

lyrics.text: And my heart is feeling vacant
lyrics.translation: 而我的内心也倍感空虚

lyrics.text: So you try to fill it in
lyrics.translation: 所以你尽力去填补空白

lyrics.text: You say "I can fix the broken in your heart
lyrics.translation: 你说“我可以修复你支离破碎的心
亲爱的你值得我拯救”

lyrics.text: But I don't know why you're shooting in the dark
lyrics.translation: 但我不明白你为什么要在深夜落荒逃离
我对万事无自信
但是爱，它为我祈祷
我从未幸得某人呵护

lyrics.text: So I don't know how to love
lyrics.translation: 所以我不懂怎么去爱
请为我祈祷
我知道我需要某个人陪伴

lyrics.text: So I can learn how to love
lyrics.translation: 所以我可以学会去热爱

lyrics.text: I know it's been a while
lyrics.translation: 我知道我已经恍惚很久
因为我在审判我的回忆

lyrics.text: For the way I used to be
lyrics.translation: 我曾经亦是如此
我的思绪飞跃几英里

lyrics.text: Round in circles and I try
lyrics.translation: 循环往复而我在努力

lyrics.text: To find the little light in me
lyrics.translation: 去探寻心中的那盏小明灯

lyrics.text: You say "I can fix the broken in your heart
lyrics.translation: 你说“我可以修复你的玻璃心
亲爱的你值得我拯救”

lyrics.text: But I don't know why you're shooting in the dark
lyrics.translation: 但我不明白你为什么要在深夜落荒逃离
我对万事无自信
但是爱，它为我祈祷
我从未幸得某人呵护

lyrics.text: So I don't know how to love
lyrics.translation: 所以我不懂怎么去爱
请为我祈祷
我知道我需要某个人陪伴

lyrics.text: So I can learn how to love
lyrics.translation: 所以我可以学会去热爱
我知道我需要某个人陪伴
我知道我需要某个人陪伴
我很清楚我急需某人的陪伴

lyrics.text: So I can learn how to love
lyrics.translation: 所以我可以学会去热爱
怎么去爱
如何去爱你

lyrics.text: So I can learn how to love
lyrics.translation: 所以我可以学会去热爱
怎么去爱
如何去爱你
怎样才算热爱

lyrics.text: Love, love, love, love, love, love, oh
lyrics.translation: 爱，爱，爱，爱，爱，爱，唉
我知道我需要某个人陪伴
我知道我需要某个人陪伴
我很清楚我急需某人的陪伴

lyrics.text: So I can learn how to love
lyrics.translation: 所以我完全可以学会去爱你

source_file: How to Love (feat. Sofia Reyes) - Cash Cash,Sofia Reyes.lrc
